positive: Minimalist graphic illustration of a soaring golden retriever silhouette leaping through a field of wildflowers at sunrise. The style should be modern flat design, high contrast, using earthy tones of teal, ochre, and deep indigo. Emphasize clean, crisp lines and a dynamic, symmetrical composition. The focus is on the dog's joyful energy and the organic flow of the flowers. Perfect for a central apparel placement, vector-style, highly stylized, simple background with slight depth variation.
